description: 누적 지식그래프 — 모든 트리플을 포함하는 전체 그래프

nodes.label: Hezbollah First Rocket Fire Since Ceasefire (Apr 21)

edges.subject: ent-224
edges.reason: WPR Day 60 reached → Democrats demand accountability → Hegseth hearing. WPR deadline is the proximate cause of first congressional oversight.

edges.subject: ent-226
edges.reason: Trump 'blockade until nuclear deal' → Iran 'practical action' threat. Direct causal sequence within same news cycle.

edges.subject: ent-225
edges.reason: Iran war → energy price surge → FOMC cites elevated inflation from global energy → 8-4 split on easing bias. War indirectly caused Fed's most divided decision in 34 years.

edges.subject: ent-223
edges.reason: IDF chief's 'no ceasefire' contradicts Lebanon 3-week ceasefire extension. Military reality opposes diplomatic framework.

edges.subject: ent-227
edges.reason: Day 10 (14 killed) → Day 13 (8 killed, 3 rescue workers) = escalation chain. Double-tap tactics increasingly targeting emergency responders.
